entry.title: New: RES24-279 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, LODGING AND CONFERENCE FEE, VALUED AT $2,481.36, TO THE CITY FROM THE LEGAL CLINIC FOR A MEMBER OF THE OFFICE OF ECONOMIC REVITILIZATION TO ATTEND THE NATIONAL IMMIGRANT INCLUSION CONFERENCE, DECEMBER 8-10, 2024 IN HOUSTON, TEXAS.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
